mapper.sql: id, enterprise_code, enterprise_name, credit_code, industry_code, province_code, city_code, address, contact_name, contact_phone, audit_year, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ent_enterprise WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM ent_enterprise WHERE enterprise_code = #{enterpriseCode} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ent_enterprise ( enterprise_code, enterprise_name, credit_code, industry_code, province_code, city_code, address, contact_name, contact_phone, audit_year, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{enterpriseCode}, #{enterpriseName}, #{creditCode}, #{industryCode}, #{provinceCode}, #{cityCode}, #{address}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{auditYear}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE ent_enterprise
update_time = NOW(), enterprise_name = #{enterpriseName}, credit_code = #{creditCode}, industry_code = #{industryCode}, province_code = #{provinceCode}, city_code = #{cityCode}, address = #{address}, contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, status = #{status},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE ent_enterprise SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
